category_sources: source_facts.description says GitHub Markdown previewer; official README says Grip renders local README files before sending them to GitHub.
display_name_sources: Official README title is Grip -- GitHub Readme Instant Preview; source_facts.name is grip.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation, usage, configuration, and API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page; official README is in joeyespo/grip.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe local GitHub Markdown/README preview from the command line.
